pi_items.source: Python math.pi conversion of 40.71 degrees N from task description.
Python math.pi conversion of 74.00 degrees W from task description.
verifier.py script checks diff against lat_lon_tolerance.
task.json description and verifier.py explicit checks for these specific flags.
task.json description and export_result.sh GUIDE_PATH variable.
task.json description and export_result.sh SCREENSHOT_DIR variable.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Stellarium to New York City (latitude 40.71° N ≈ 0.71052 radians, longitude 74.00° W ≈ -1.29154 radians) with a tolerance of 0.10 radians. The display configuration must have the atmosphere disabled, the azimuthal grid enabled, and constellation lines enabled. The agent must create an event guide at /home/ga/Desktop/eclipse_event_guide.txt and capture a screenshot saved in /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium.
